channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [AHL] Abans Financial Services Ltd: Re-appointment of Managing Director and Independent Director
item.description:
Abans Financial Services Ltd has announced the re-appointment of Mr. Abhishek Bansal as Managing Director and Ms. Ashima Chhatwal as an Independent Director. Mr. Bansal, a commerce graduate and post-graduate from the University of Mumbai, has been re-appointed for a second term of 5 consecutive years. He has been instrumental in evolving the Abans Group into a diversified financial services entity. Ms. Chhatwal, with 8+ years of experience in legal and corporate sectors, has also been re-appointed for her second term of 5 consecutive years. She has worked with HCL Technologies Limited, AZB & Partners, and Trilegal.

  • Re-appointment of Mr. Abhishek Bansal as Managing Director for a second term of 5 years.
  • Re-appointment of Ms. Ashima Chhatwal as an Independent Director for a second term of 5 years.
  • Mr. Bansal is a commerce graduate and post-graduate from the University of Mumbai.
  • Ms. Chhatwal has 8+ years of experience in legal and corporate sectors.
  • Mr. Bansal has been instrumental in the growth of the Abans Group.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Abans Holdings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KWIL] Kwality Walls (India) Ltd: New Promoter, Director Resignation, and Reclassification of Outgoing Promoters
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kwality Walls (India) Ltd announced changes in its Board of Directors, including the acquisition of control by a new promoter, the resignation of an additional director, and the reclassification of outgoing promoters. The new promoter, Magnum Ice Cream Company Holdco 1 Netherlands B.V., acquired 61.90% of the equity share capital from the outgoing promoters. Mr. Ritesh Tiwari resigned as Additional (Non-Executive and Non-Independent) Director, and Mr. Abhijit Bhattacharya and Mr. Tahir Toloy Tanridagli were appointed as Additional (Non-Executive and Non-Independent) Directors. The outgoing promoters were reclassified from the 'promoter' category to the 'public' category.

  • New promoter Magnum Ice Cream Company Holdco 1 Netherlands B.V. acquires 61.90% equity share capital
  • Mr. Ritesh Tiwari resigns as Additional (Non-Executive and Non-Independent) Director
  • Mr. Abhijit Bhattacharya and Mr. Tahir Toloy Tanridagli appointed as Additional (Non-Executive and Non-Independent) Directors
  • Outgoing promoters reclassified from 'promoter' to 'public' category

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KWIL | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [KWIL] Unilever Transfers Control of Kwality Walls to The Magnum Ice Cream Company HoldCo 1 Netherlands B.V.
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kwality Walls (India) Ltd announced a re-classification from 'promoter' category to 'public' category following the transfer of 61.90% equity shares to The Magnum Ice Cream Company HoldCo 1 Netherlands B.V. The transaction was executed through a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated 25th June, 2025. The Magnum Ice Cream Company HoldCo 1 Netherlands B.V. has acquired control over the company and is now classified as a 'promoter'. The Outgoing Promoters, who no longer hold any equity shares, have been reclassified as 'public' in accordance with Regulation 31A of the Listing Regulations.

  • The Magnum Ice Cream Company HoldCo 1 Netherlands B.V. acquires 61.90% equity shares of Kwality Walls (India) Ltd from Unilever and other outgoing promoters.
  • Unilever and other outgoing promoters cease to be in control of Kwality Walls (India) Ltd and are reclassified as 'public'.
  • The Magnum Ice Cream Company HoldCo 1 Netherlands B.V. is now classified as a 'promoter' of Kwality Walls (India) Ltd.
  • The transaction was executed through a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated 25th June, 2025.
  • The reclassification is effective from 30th March, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KWIL | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MUTHTFN] Muthoot Capital Services Ltd Raises ₹176 Crores Through Securitization of Two-Wheeler Loans
item.description:
Muthoot Capital Services Ltd has successfully completed two securitization transactions on March 30, 2026, raising a total of ₹176,37,43,051.70 (Rupees One Hundred and Seventy-Six Crores Thirty-Seven Lakhs Forty-Three Thousand Fifty-One and Seventy Paise) by assigning Two-Wheeler Loan receivables. The first transaction involved raising ₹103,70,01,698.70 (Rupees One Hundred and Three Crores Seventy Lakhs One Thousand Six Hundred and Ninety-Eight and Seventy Paise) from a pool of ₹111,50,55,590 (Rupees One Hundred and Eleven Crores Fifty Lakhs Fifty-Five Thousand Five Hundred and Ninety) in receivables. The second transaction raised ₹72,67,42,353 (Rupees Seventy-Two Crores Sixty-Seven Lakhs Forty-Two Thousand Three Hundred and Fifty-Three) from a pool of ₹77,31,30,163 (Rupees Seventy-Seven Crores Thirty-One Lakhs Thirty Thousand One Hundred and Sixty-Three) in receivables. These transactions represent the seventh and eighth Securitization / Direct Assignment transactions carried out by the Company during FY 2025-26, with the entire pool being from the non-priority sector and taken after considering the Reserve Bank of India's guidelines.

  • Muthoot Capital Services Ltd raises ₹176 crores through securitization of Two-Wheeler Loans.
  • Two successful securitization transactions completed on March 30, 2026.
  • First transaction: ₹103.7 crores raised from a pool of ₹111.5 crores in receivables.
  • Second transaction: ₹72.67 crores raised from a pool of ₹77.31 crores in receivables.
  • Seventh and eighth Securitization / Direct Assignment transactions during FY 2025-26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MUTHOOT CAPITAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [JKPAPER] JK Paper Ltd Delays Commissioning of Hardwood Bleach Chemical Thermo-Mechanical Pulp Plant to Q1 FY 2026-27
item.description:
🔥 Trending

JK Paper Ltd has announced a delay in the commissioning of their Hardwood Bleach Chemical Thermo-Mechanical Pulp (BCTMP) Plant. The plant, which was earlier expected to commence operations by the 4th quarter of FY 2025–26, is now at advanced stages of erection and commissioning. Commercial production is expected to begin in the 1st quarter of FY 2026–27.

  • JK Paper Ltd delays the commissioning of their BCTMP Plant to Q1 FY 2026-27
  • The plant was earlier expected to commence operations by the 4th quarter of FY 2025–26
  • The plant is currently at advanced stages of erection and commissioning
  • Commercial production to begin in the 1st quarter of FY 2026–27

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JK PAPER LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RAGHUSYN] Raghuvir Synthetics Ltd Completes Sale of Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited
item.description:
Raghuvir Synthetics Ltd has successfully completed the sale of its entire shareholding of 51% in Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited to Mr. Yash Sunil Agarwal and Mr. Hardik Sunil Agarwal, who are also promoters of the company. The transaction was entered into on 27th March 2026 and completed on 30th March 2026. The consideration for the sale is Rs. 51000. Post-transaction, Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of Raghuvir Synthetics Ltd.

  • Raghuvir Synthetics Ltd sells entire shareholding of 51% in Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited.
  • Transaction completed on 30th March 2026.
  • Consideration for the sale is Rs. 51000.
  • Buyers are Mr. Yash Sunil Agarwal and Mr. Hardik Sunil Agarwal, who are also promoters of the company.
  • Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited ceases to be a subsidiary of Raghuvir Synthetics Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAGHUVIR SYNTHETICS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TATASTEEL] Tata Steel Ltd Acquires Complete Stake in Medica TS Hospital Private Limited for ₹1.49 Crore
item.description:
Tata Steel Limited has completed the acquisition of securities in Medica TS Hospital Private Limited from Manipal Hospitals Eastern India Private Limited. The acquisition includes 7,40,000 equity shares of face value ₹10/- each, constituting 49% equity stake, and 2,30,05,182 Optionally Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares, constituting 31.85% of preference share stake. This acquisition results in Tata Steel Limited holding 100% stake in equity shareholding and in OCRPS of Medica TS Hospital, making it a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.

  • Tata Steel Ltd acquires complete stake in Medica TS Hospital Private Limited.
  • The acquisition includes 49% equity stake and 31.85% preference share stake in Medica TS Hospital.
  • The total consideration for the acquisition is ₹1.49 crore.
  • Medica TS Hospital has become a wholly owned subsidiary of Tata Steel Limited.
  • This disclosure is made in compliance with Securities and Exchange Board of India regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA STEEL LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [3MINDIA] 3M India to Cease PG&F Operations After Global Closing on April 1, 2026
item.description:
3M India Ltd has announced an update on the Precision Grinding & Finishing (PG&F) business. In September 2025, 3M Company, USA agreed to sell the global PG&F business to Nimbus, a Europe-based private equity firm. The PG&F business in India generated approximately INR 26 crore in sales during FY 2024-25 and is supported by two employees. Due to the global sale, 3M India will cease all PG&F related operations in India upon the closing, which is expected on April 1, 2026. A Transition Distribution Services Agreement will be in place for up to 12 months, extendable by an additional 6 months, to ensure continuity of supply to customers during the transition phase.

  • 3M India to cease PG&F operations after global closing on April 1, 2026
  • 3M Company, USA agreed to sell global PG&F business to Nimbus in September 2025
  • PG&F business in India generated INR 26 crore in sales during FY 2024-25
  • Transition Distribution Services Agreement in place for up to 18 months
  • Agreement aimed at ensuring continuity of supply to customers during the transition phase

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 3M INDIA LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [AMBUJACEM] Sanction of Scheme of Arrangement Between Penna Cement and Ambuja Cements
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ambuja Cements Limited has informed the stock exchange about the Sanction of Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries Limited and Ambuja Cements Limited and their respective shareholders. The Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench has sanctioned the Scheme of Arrangement. The Appointed Date of the Scheme is August 16, 2024. The Scheme will be effective upon completion of the steps, as laid out in the Scheme. The above intimation will be uploaded on the website of the Company.

  • Sanction of Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries Limited and Ambuja Cements Limited
  • The Scheme of Arrangement is sanctioned by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench
  • The Appointed Date of the Scheme is August 16, 2024
  • The Scheme will be effective upon completion of the steps, as laid out in the Scheme
  • The intimation will be uploaded on the website of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMBUJA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [AHL] Abans Financial Services Ltd: Re-appointment of Directors for Second Term
item.description:
Abans Financial Services Ltd has announced the re-appointment of Mr. Abhishek Bansal as Managing Director and Ms. Ashima Chhatwal as an Independent Director for a second term of 5 consecutive years each. The re-appointments were approved by the shareholders in a postal ballot notice dated February 09, 2026.

  • Re-appointment of Mr. Abhishek Bansal as Managing Director for a second term of 5 consecutive years.
  • Re-appointment of Ms. Ashima Chhatwal as an Independent Director for a second term of 5 consecutive years.
  • Approval of the re-appointments by the shareholders in a postal ballot.
  • Mr. Abhishek Bansal is a founder of the Abans Group and has been instrumental in its evolution and growth.
  • Ms. Ashima Chhatwal has extensive experience in merger acquisitions, legal matters, corporate governance, and compliances.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Abans Holdings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
